---
title: "Sticker"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(magick)
library(dplyr)
library(hexSticker)
```

```{r}
img <- image_read("ampharos.png")
img %>% 
  image_convert("png") %>% 
  image_resize("1080 x 200")%>% 
  image_fill(color="#062047", point="+45") %>% 
  image_annotate("", size=38, location = "+47+58", color="black") -> res

res
```

```{r}
# wrap in plot to preview ie plot(sticker(...))
final_res<-sticker(res, package="AMPH", p_size=30,
             p_y = 1.5,
             s_x=1, s_y=0.8, s_width=1.1,
             s_height = 14,
        filename="mde_icon_2.png",h_fill="#000080",h_color = "#000080")

plot(final_res)
```
